programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Suing Our Way To Space"
programs.desc: Cowboy hat-wearing billionaires have reasons for their multi-billion dollar investment in space exploration but it’s hard to ignore how much money they stand to make.

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Will Satellites Help Us Save or Exploit Earth?"
programs.sub_title: Will Satellites Help Us Save or Exploit Earth?
programs.desc: Our long-term survival on this planet depends on advanced satellites keeping us connected and keeping an eye on the Earth from orbit.

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Space Pirates"
programs.desc: Between advanced satellites and tons of precious resources the future of space exploration looks to be highly profitable.

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Mad Scientists In Outer Space"
programs.desc: The unique properties of space make it ideal for some world-changing and unique scientific experiments.

programs.title: Power & S3 - "Boxing - Ruqsana Begum"
programs.desc: Ruqsana Begum is a Muay Tai world champion who wants to become the next world champion in boxing. She’s wants to inspire Muslim women and make a difference.

programs.title: Power & S3 - "MMA - Nick Hein"
programs.desc: Nick Hein is a professional Mixed Martial Artist from Cologne and signed with the UFC. His ultimate goal is to become MMA world champion.
